steps.title: Find the subject of the verb
steps.content: The clause is structured as "a writing technique that ______ emphasis." The relative pronoun that refers back to the singular antecedent "a writing technique," so the blank is governed by a singular subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
A singular subject takes a singular verb (the -s form in present tense).

A) create — base form used with plural subjects; disagrees with singular "a writing technique." Wrong.
B) are creating — plural progressive; disagrees with singular subject. Wrong.
C) have created — plural present-perfect; disagrees with singular subject. Wrong.
D) creates — singular present (-s form); correctly agrees with the singular subject "a writing technique." Correct.

D is correct.
